title: iberis amara var. arvatica
intro: Iberis amara var. arvatica, also known as the bitter candytuft or rock candytuft, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which help to relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Iberis amara var. arvatica can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions.
